understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character on a tile grid to reach the goal gem (+).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you either MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a specific tile at a given [x, y]. After any horizontal move, gravity (here: DOWN) automatically carries the character until they land on a solid/support tile or hit a hazard; landing on spikes (u/v) loses immediately, while reaching the goal wins. CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks (x) without moving the player. UNDO reverses the previous action.
